title: Premium renderer cleanup
summary: Final authoritative premium renderer for both Cyber Red Elite and VoidRage Inferno.
fixed: Cyber Red Elite preview not loading reliably
VoidRage Inferno edge/crop looked bad
per-premium layout separation reinforced with v103 storage keys

title: Inferno transparency fix + per-premium editor split
summary: VoidRage Inferno now uses a truly transparent PNG and the layout editor stores Cyber Red Elite and VoidRage Inferno separately.
fixed: removed white non-transparent checkerboard from VoidRage Inferno background
style-specific editor storage keys to stop one premium from overwriting the other
generator fallback reads the correct per-style saved layout

title: Inferno image fix + per-style layout editor
summary: VoidRage Inferno now uses its correct red/black image and the Layout Editor saves separate JSON/state for each premium overlay.
fixed: wrong/stale Inferno background asset
Layout Editor changes leaking across premium overlays
generator layout param now works per premium style

anteprima Inferno ereditava CSS Cyber Red Elite
posizionamento tramite script instabile
